title: View mode matches edit mode for a doc
excerpt:
Description
I create a staff resource board. When I view it, it doesn’t match how it looks in edit mode. The font is different and you can’t use/see the drop downs. It seems odd that these would be different in view mode…

posts.author: amanda18 (Amanda)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I create a staff resource board. When I view it, it doesn’t match how it looks in edit mode. The font is different and you can’t use/see the drop downs. It seems odd that these would be different in view mode. The dropdown is very helpful to organize a document.

What are you trying to achieve

More organization and a simpler interface
